name: ielts
description: A tutoring team for IELTS writing and speaking: assess, coach, and drill.

modelTiers.smart: the strongest available reasoning tier, for assessment and feedback
modelTiers.fast: a quick, cheap tier for drills and bookkeeping

memory.promotion: L1 episodic: per-session errors. L2 curated: an error type seen in 3+ sessions becomes a tracked weakness. L3 synthesis: a resolved weakness becomes a mastery note.
